infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ClaudERP uses the camera to capture receipts and invoices so they can be processed automatically.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ClaudERP needs access to your photos to attach receipts and invoices to expense claims.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ClaudERP to access your camera to capture receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ClaudERP to access your photos to attach receipts.
